updateInstructionsforWebsite: npm run build --------- scp -r dist/* debian@51.79.65.31:/srv/scx-site/dist/ -------- sudo caddy fmt --overwrite /etc/caddy/Caddyfile ----------- sudo caddy validate --config /etc/caddy/Caddyfile ------------- sudo systemctl reload caddy
updateInstructions: typically only need to build and upload, no caddy reload for smaller simple updates

contact.title: Contact — Swing ConneXion | Swing Dance Montreal
contact.desc: Get in touch with Swing ConneXion — Montreal's swing dance school on the Plateau. Questions about classes, private lessons, or Mercredis Swing? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.tags: swing montreal, cours de danse montreal, contact swing connexion

landing.title: Swing ConneXion — Swing Dance Classes in Montreal
landing.desc: Montreal's swing dance school on the Plateau. Lindy Hop, Balboa, Charleston — group classes, private lessons, and live jazz every Wednesday.
landing.tags: swing montreal, swing dance classes montreal, lindy hop montreal, cours de danse montreal, plateau mont-royal

groupClasses.title: Swing Dance Group Classes Montreal | Swing ConneXion
groupClasses.desc: Lindy Hop, Balboa & Charleston group classes on the Plateau Mont-Royal. All levels welcome — from total beginner to advanced. Register now.
groupClasses.tags: swing dance classes montreal, lindy hop montreal, balboa montreal, charleston montreal, cours de danse plateau

introClasses.title: Free Weekly Intro Swing Class Montreal | Swing ConneXion
introClasses.desc: Try swing dancing for free every Wednesday at Café La Ligne Verte. Intro class at 7pm followed by three sets of live jazz. No experience needed.
introClasses.tags: free swing class montreal, intro swing dance montreal, mercredis swing, live jazz montreal wednesday

mercredisswing.title: Mercredis Swing — Live Jazz & Swing Dancing Montreal
mercredisswing.desc: Every Wednesday at Café La Ligne Verte: three sets of live jazz at 8pm + a free intro swing class at 7pm. Montreal's weekly swing night since 2007.
mercredisswing.tags: live jazz montreal, swing dancing montreal, mercredis swing, live jazz wednesday montreal, lindy hop social

privatelessons.title: Private Swing Dance Lessons Montreal | Swing ConneXion
privatelessons.desc: One-on-one coaching in Lindy Hop, Balboa or Charleston on the Plateau. Progress faster at your own pace with personalized feedback from SCX instructors.
privatelessons.tags: private swing lessons montreal, lindy hop private class, swing dance coaching montreal, plateau mont-royal

registration.title: Register for Swing Classes Montreal | Swing ConneXion
registration.desc: Sign up for swing dance classes in Montreal. Choose your level, pick your schedule, and join the SCX community on the Plateau Mont-Royal.
registration.tags: register swing classes montreal, sign up dance montreal, swing connexion inscription

staff.title: Our Instructors — Swing ConneXion Montreal
staff.desc: Meet the teachers and artists behind Swing ConneXion. Passionate lindy hoppers, balboa dancers, and swing musicians shaping Montreal's swing scene.
staff.tags: swing dance instructors montreal, lindy hop teachers montreal, swing connexion team

troupes.title: Swing Dance Performance Troupes | Swing ConneXion Montreal
troupes.desc: Swing ConneXion's performance troupes — dedicated dancers pushing the art of Lindy Hop, Balboa and swing in Montreal. Auditions and open rehearsals available.
troupes.tags: swing dance troupe montreal, lindy hop performance montreal, swing connexion troupes

codeofconduct.title: Code of Conduct — Swing ConneXion Montreal
codeofconduct.desc: Swing ConneXion is committed to a safe, inclusive, and welcoming space for all dancers. Read our community code of conduct.
codeofconduct.tags: swing connexion code of conduct, safe dance space montreal, inclusive swing community

pref.title: Preferred modes of payment
pref.intro: In full transparency, we’d rather give back to the community than pass on  processing fees. In that spirit, here are our preferred modes of payment.
pref.rbc: Direct transfer to finances.scx@gmail.com (for RBC clients)
pref.cash: Cash on your first class (please arrive early)
pref.square: Square (click on Proceed to Square Payment)

hero.desc: Review your items and complete payment.

empty.message: No items to pay. Go back to registration.

payment.comingSoon: Online payment will be hooked up shortly.

register.title: Registration
register.subtitle: Welcome, or welcome again to SCX - Choose your adventure!
register.error: Oops, something went wrong. Please try again.
register.spinnerMessage: Creating registration(s), we'll take you to the payment and confirmation page afterwards!
register.selectAtLeastOne: Please select at least one class.
register.studentRebate_help: Applies a $40 discount per selected class (never below $0).

hero.desc: At Swing ConneXion, our group classes are structured so anyone can learn swing dances easily.
Every Wednesday at Café La Ligne Verte (2531 Ontario Est), come and try out swing dance... for free! Intro class at 7pm 19h, followed by three sets of live jazz and swing music!
hero.ctaReserve: Visit the Mercredis Swing FB page

hero.desc: Since 2007, Swing ConneXion supports live swing music in Montreal! Every Wednesday at Café La Ligne Verte (2531 Ontario Est), we have three sets of live music at 8pm. Curious about swing dancing? Come over at 7pm for a free intro class!
hero.ctaReserve: Visit the Mercredis Swing FB page

hero.desc: Personalized sessions to improve fast, at your own pace.

contact.intro: We'd love to hear from you. Write or call us if you have any questions or comments about our school.

hero.desc: A passionate crew powering Montréal’s swing scene.
